Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Continued To Jul-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elijah Keys, via Zoom, for Daniel Greening, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports that his client has been frequently travelling but that he has the petition for signature.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jul-26-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is advised to file a petition on or before Jul-18-2022 or his appearance will be required.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Duong. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-22-2022 Continued To Jun-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-09-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elijah Keyes appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 27, 2020 is admitted to probate. Daniel Rex Greening is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for February 22, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by April 4, 2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Continued To Dec-09-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
